posts.text: Marine insurers may do well from the war. But the longer it lasts, the more uncertain their prospects become. To discover why, register to read the full story (it’s free) https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2026/05/21/the-insurers-on-the-hook-for-war-in-iran?taid=6a1175f5acead50001d7eeeb&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
